scene.message: Elly: The air in here{nl} is terrible.{waitkey}{ret}
You currently have{nl} {ctl11} coins.{waitkey}{ret}
There is a poker game.{waitkey}{ret}
What would you like to do?{nl} {ctl0e:3}{ret}
You currently have{nl} {ctl11} coins.{waitkey}{ret}
There is a blackjack game.{waitkey}{ret}
What would you like to do?{nl} {ctl0e:3}{ret}
You currently have{nl} {ctl11} coins.{waitkey}{ret}
There is a slot machine.{waitkey}{ret}
What would you like to do?{nl} {ctl0e:3}{ret}
You currently have{nl} {ctl11} coins.{waitkey}{ret}
There is a dice game.{waitkey}{ret}
What would you like to do?{nl} {ctl0e:3}{ret}
You currently have{nl} {ctl12} Metal Cards.{waitkey}{ret}
There is a Code Breaker.{waitkey}{ret}
What would you like to do?{nl} {ctl0e:24}{ret}
